hero.title: Clear answers to make better decisions about exam prep with AI
hero.description: We gathered the most common questions about access, billing, tests, progress, and AI into one public guide. This page is designed to answer real questions before you waste time hunting for scattered information.

intro.title: A useful, direct answer base built around real search intent
intro.description: This is not filler content. The FAQ explains how the platform works, what to expect from the study experience, and when it makes sense to contact support or review content more carefully.

trust.title: Structured for both SEO and AI answer engines
trust.description: Each section answers a concrete intent, uses plain language, and keeps a format that is easy to parse for traditional search and AI-driven response systems.

cta.title: Once the basics are clear, the next step is to start practicing
cta.description: Explore the plans or create your account to access tests, progress tracking, and AI-assisted help inside the platform.

page.title: Frequently asked questions about exam prep, AI, and online tests
page.description: Read frequently asked questions about access, subscriptions, tests, progress, and AI in Iberica Oposiciones. A public guide built to answer real concerns.
